case_title: LEUNG, CHE KONG VS RIVERA, JOSE ANTONIO et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEUNG, CHE KONG AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, JOSE ANTONIO PACIFIC SNAPPLE  (OWNER AND EMPLOYER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00) SERVED OCT-09-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC SNAPPLE  (OWNER AND EMPLOYER)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC. 12, 2007. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT:CLERK:F.RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2007 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO RIVERA, JOSE ANTONIO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUNG, CHE KONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, JOSE ANTONIO PACIFIC SNAPPLE  (OWNER AND EMPLOYER) $4,207.50 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,327.50, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $3675.00 FOR PROPERTY LOSS AND $100.00 FOR BODILY INJURY. THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 10% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF; THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
